docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $150.00 FILED BY RIBAY LEON JR. DAVIS PATTIE AS TO DEFENDANT DIAZ MANUEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-03-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DIAZ MANUEL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RIBAY LEON JR. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DIAZ MANUEL $100.00 PRINCIPAL, $23.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $123.00, WARRANTY TO BE EXTENDED 90 DAYS FROM 7/25/92 TO 10/25/92 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF JUDGMENT TO PLAINTIFF RETURNED, ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN.
